zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert de Langston於1310年出生在英國英格蘭藍卡爾克雷頓時，他的父親John de Langton25歲，母親Alice de Banastre23歲。他和Margaret de Orrell至少有4個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1361年9月26日在英國萊希斯特斯爾馬可特 哈波洛享年51歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Langston
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (mainly West Midlands): habitational name from any of various places, for example Langstone in Devon and Hampshire, named with Old English lang ‘long, tall’ + stān ‘stone’, i.e. a menhir.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert de Langston was born in 1310, in Clayton, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, his father, John de Langton, was 25 and his mother, Alice de Banastre, was 23. He had at least 4 sons and 1 daughter with Margaret de Orrell. He died on 26 September 1361, in Market Harborough, Leicestershire, England, at the age of 51.

ko.lifeSummary: Robert de Langston(이)가 1310년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 클레이턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John de Langton(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice de Banastre(은)는 23세였다. 그는 Margaret de Orrell(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1361년 9월 26일 영국 레이스스터실르 마크트 하르버루그h에서 51세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert de Langston родился в 1310 г. в местности клеитон, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John de Langton было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice de Banastre, 23. У него было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь от Margaret de Orrell. Он умер 26 сентября 1361 г. в местности маркет харбороую, лисестиршир, Англия в возрасте 51 год.
